Other apps for field hockey
Sound familiar?

Every coach knows
this frustration

Field hockey runs on WhatsApp groups, paper notes, and gut feeling. Veld changes that.

Before Veld

Match selections by WhatsApp. Players miss messages, confirmations get lost, and you spend 30 minutes chasing replies before every game.

Before Veld

Rotations on paper. No data on minutes played. You substitute by feel, not numbers. You forget who played where last week.

Before Veld

No record of anything. Stats, feedback, training attendance — scattered across spreadsheets nobody updates and chats nobody reads.

Before Veld

Recruiting is blind. Finding a player means asking around. No platform, no profiles, no filters. Just word of mouth and luck.

Global Marketplace

Global marketplace,
local impact.

The first marketplace built exclusively for field hockey. Connect clubs, coaches and players across 30+ countries — no agents, no middlemen.

  • Players build a public profile visible to clubs & coaches worldwide
  • Coaches post their CV and get discovered by clubs looking to hire
  • Clubs post open positions and recruit by country, level, and position
  • Filter by age, position, playing level, and nationality
Join the Marketplace
Match Selection

Plan matches
with precision.

Send your lineup directly to players with a reason for each decision. They confirm in one tap — no more chasing replies the morning of the game.

  • Send selections with individual notes per player
  • Players confirm availability in one tap
  • Full match schedule and results in one place
  • Team selection history across the full season
Try it free
Rotations

Control every minute
of the game.

A visual pitch board with a live timer. Track play time per player, plan substitutions in real time, and build data-driven rotation strategies.

  • Drag-and-drop players on a live pitch board
  • Real-time minute tracker per player
  • Substitution history saved automatically
  • Bench time tracked automatically per player
See rotations
Club Management Coming Soon

Your club,
all in one platform.

A full club dashboard is in development — multiple teams, coaches, staff and roles, with Sporting Director oversight across every squad.

  • Organize teams, staff and categories
  • All player profiles and availability in one place
  • Club news, events and recruitment
  • Performance overview across every squad
Notify me when Club launches
Squad & Training

Manage your squad
in seconds.

Create teams, organize players and plan training sessions with attendance tracking and player feedback — all the data you need to develop your squad.

  • Full squad management with player profiles
  • Training log with session planning and attendance
  • Collect player feedback after every session
  • Camp & clinic management with schedules and rotations
Build your squad
Dashboard

The complete
hockey network.

Everything your coaching staff needs in one place. News updates, upcoming matches, squad availability and notifications — at a glance, every day.

  • Personalised home dashboard per role
  • News posts and club event management
  • Direct messages and team communication
  • Available on iOS — coming soon on Android
